## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address. -->
<!-- e.g. "As a teacher, I have no way to export attendance data, which means I have to manually re-enter it elsewhere." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## 🎨 Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add wireframes, mockups, or links to similar features in other products. -->

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or references here. -->
